title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at HP India Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at HP India Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Frontend Developer looking for your next big career move? HP India Advisory Limited in Mumbai offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About HP India Advisory Limited:
HP India Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HP India Advisory Limited!
